summary: Iteration 4 tested: Slack + Email step types (with mocked email), optional per-step message field, GET /api/runs?workflow_id=X filter, and drill-down UI (Overview activity-run→run-details-dialog, Workflows History→workflow-runs-dialog). Backend 34/34 pass (5 new + 29 regression). Backend + all backend contracts for the 4 step types verified end-to-end (action logged / HTTP 200 / Slack HTTP 200 / email mocked). Both drill-down dialogs render steps correctly with type-specific icons and detail text. HOWEVER a critical UI bug blocks creating slack/email steps via the New Workflow form: only the webhook URL input is rendered conditionally — the slack URL input, email 'to' input, and message input are all missing.

ui_bugs.issue: Only `stepType === 'webhook'` renders a conditional input (`workflow-step-url-input`). For slack: no url input; for email: no `workflow-step-to-input`; for slack+email: no `workflow-step-message-input`. Combined with the addStep() guards (`if ((stepType==='webhook'||stepType==='slack') && !stepUrl.trim()) return;` and `if (stepType==='email' && !stepTo.trim()) return;`), it is IMPOSSIBLE to add a slack or email step through the UI — clicking Add is silently a no-op. Message field also cannot be provided from UI for any step type.

action_items: In /app/frontend/src/pages/dashboard/Workflows.jsx, extend the conditional-input block (currently ~lines 152-154) to also render: (a) workflow-step-url-input when stepType==='slack'; (b) workflow-step-to-input when stepType==='email'; (c) workflow-step-message-input when stepType==='slack' || stepType==='email'. Wire each to stepUrl / stepTo / stepMessage state (already declared in component).
critical_code_review_comments: Bug root cause: Workflows.jsx line 152 only checks `stepType === 'webhook'` for rendering url input; slack path adds a stepUrl state variable and addStep guard but never renders any input for the user to fill it. Same for email/message.
Backend _run_step is clean: falls back to default text if step.message missing (line 459) — nice safety net.
GET /api/runs owner_filter applied before workflow_id merge — verified cross-user leakage impossible (test_runs_workflow_id_scoped_to_owner passes).
RunSteps component correctly maps type→icon (webhook→Link2, slack→MessageSquare, email→Mail, action→FileText) and defaults to FileText for unknown types.
server.py now 611 lines — approaching split threshold (auth / clients / workflows / exec into separate modules recommended).
CORS still `*` with allow_credentials=True (backend/.env) — carried over from iter 2/3, non-blocking today (same origin) but browsers reject credentialed CORS with wildcard.
Public /api/contact still has no per-IP rate limit — spammer can trigger webhook runs via active 'New contact form submission' workflows.

success_rate.frontend: 80% — Overview run-details-dialog + Workflows history-dialog work perfectly; step creation form for slack/email/message is broken

test_credentials: admin@streamline.app / StreamAdmin#2026 verified. Existing 'Multi Step WF' in admin scope already contains all 4 step types (Ping/Notify team/Email boss/Log it) with 1 successful run — used it to exercise history and details dialogs since UI can't create such a workflow.
seed_data_creation: Backend tests create TEST_* prefixed workflows and delete them in-place. Two ephemeral users (ownA_/ownB_) registered per scope test — not cleaned. 'Multi Step WF' pre-existing seed used for UI verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend contracts for iter 4 are green (34/34). If E1 adds the missing 3 conditional inputs to Workflows.jsx, only smoke-test the UI create flow for slack (needs URL+message) and email (needs to+message) then re-run test_iteration4.py once. The workflow-runs-dialog and run-details-dialog already work — no need to retest those. Keep using 'Multi Step WF' seed for regression on drill-downs.
